Subject: Welcome to SourceA Platform Runtime

Hi {{name}},

Thanks for subscribing to SourceA Platform Runtime.

Next steps (manual provision v1 — we respond within 2 hours):

1. Download Chat Unify.app: https://sourcea.app/downloads/chat-unify-mac-v1.dmg
2. Open Connect tab → wire your Cursor or webhook
3. Run Verify & Act once — receipt lands on disk

Your sandbox: https://sourcea.app/sourcea/factories/try-factory-demo

Questions: hello@sourcea.app (when inbox live) or intake form at https://sourcea.app/
